name: Stripe Payment Authorization Flow
description: User books a service, inputs an estimated amount, and authorizes payment using a test Stripe card.

planSteps.description: Click on the first available service
Select a date and time, and enter an estimated budget of 9000
On the checkout page, click the 'Proceed to Payment' button
Verify the Stripe payment element appears
Enter test card details (4242...) and authorize the payment hold
Verify the payment succeeds and redirects to the dashboard
